title: Install-integrated SDLC Change Observatory
summary: Provide a local visual application shipped inside the Agentic SDLC plugin that reconstructs what was requested, decided, changed, verified, and released across stories, phases, contracts, and iterations for technical and non-technical readers.
acceptance_criteria: After plugin installation, agentic-sdlc observe --root <project> launches the included application without a separate build or cloud service.
The overview answers What was asked?, What changed?, and Why was it decided? from canonical .sdlc evidence and links every claim to source records.
The timeline shows story iterations across Discovery, Analysis, Design, Implementation, Validation, and Release, distinguishing recorded, inferred, missing, blocked, and complete states.
Contracts, approvals, decisions, assumptions, risks, changed files, tests, gates, handoffs, sync events, and release evidence are navigable with raw-record access.
Natural-language explanations are clearly labeled as generated, contain no private chain-of-thought, and expose only stored rationale, inputs, outputs, alternatives, and evidence.
The server is read-only, binds to loopback by default, validates Host and paths, blocks traversal and symlink escape, sends a restrictive CSP, and does not enable CORS.
Partial, legacy, empty, and malformed knowledge bases produce bounded diagnostics without crashing or silently inventing history.
The UI is keyboard accessible, responsive from 360px to desktop, respects reduced motion, and keeps technical detail available without forcing it on business readers.
Package contents, launcher behavior, lineage normalization, security invariants, and the primary browser workflow have automated tests.
